header.hospital_edition: Hospital Integration Edition · IUC B.Tech Final Project

home.hero_subtitle: Hospital Integration · 1D-CNN Arrhythmia Detection · CVD Risk Prediction
home.hero_tagline: Bridging hospital ECG equipment with real-time AI cardiac analysis and proactive physician alerts.
home.features_intro: A complete five-layer cloud-native architecture that connects existing hospital ECG equipment to an AI processing engine, with real-time results delivered to physicians.
home.feature1_text: Standard 12-lead ECG equipment already deployed in Cameroonian hospitals captures the patient's cardiac signal during a routine examination.
home.feature2_text: ECG data is securely transmitted via HTTPS API with hospital-level authentication. No wearable device required — the workflow plugs into existing hospital practice.
home.feature3_text: A 1D Convolutional Neural Network classifies the heartbeat rhythm and an XGBoost model predicts cardiovascular disease risk on a 0–100 scale.
home.feature4_text: When HIGH cardiovascular risk is detected, the responsible physician receives an SMS alert within 5 seconds — even if they are away from the dashboard.
home.about_p1: This platform was designed as the final-year B.Tech project of the School of Engineering and Applied Science at the University Institute of the Coast (IUC), Douala.
home.about_p2: It addresses the specific challenges of cardiac diagnosis in resource-constrained settings: shortage of cardiologists, limited cardiac AI tools tailored for African contexts, and delayed identification of high-risk patients.
home.about_p3: The system uses peer-reviewed, clinically validated data sources (the MIT-BIH Arrhythmia Database) and follows international standards for medical software, including HL7 FHIR for data exchange.
home.cta_subtitle: Doctors review patient data · Patients track their own cardiac health.
home.footer_credits: © 2026 ECG AI Platform · IUC B.Tech Final Project · School of Engineering and Applied Science
